name: Saul Centers Inc. Depositary Shares each representing 1/100th of a share of 6.125% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Saul Centers Inc. Depositary Shares represent fractional interests in shares of their preferred stock, specifically the 6.125% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. Saul Centers is a REIT (Real Estate Investment Trust) focused on owning and operating community and neighborhood shopping centers. The company is based in Bethesda, Maryland.
